Class ProductDiscountFactory

java.lang.Object
discount.ProductDiscountFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
DiscountFactory
public class ProductDiscountFactory extends Object implements DiscountFactory
It implements the factory for those with store product coverage
See Also:

  • StoreProduct

    Description

    Instantiates a new Product discount factory over the whole store

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductDiscountFactory

      public ProductDiscountFactory(StoreProduct[] targetProducts)
      Instantiates a new Product discount factory with a product selection
      Parameters:
      targetProducts - the desired targetProducts

    • ProductDiscountFactory

      public ProductDiscountFactory(boolean overWholeStore)
      Instantiates a new Product discount factory over the whole store
      Parameters:
      overWholeStore - whether the discount is applied over all the store products or not

    • createFixedPercentageDiscount

      public ProductFixedPercentage createFixedPercentageDiscount(String id, LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double percentage)
      The fixed percentage discount's general constructor whose coverage is Product
      Specified by:
      createFixedPercentageDiscount in interface DiscountFactory
      Parameters:
      id - the discount's id
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      percentage - the discount's percentage
      Returns:
      the new ProductFixedPercentage discount
